## v1.0.34 — Install Addons UX + pip stack shortcut

- **Pip-only shortcut** — when only pip-deps / music-video-sync are missing, skip reinstalling Git/Node/Python and go straight to torch pip (~2–4 GB)
- **Installer timing** — local start time, red **Eastern EST/EDT** estimated finish, blue **Phase N/4** progress lines
- **Packaging** — include `install-time-estimate.cjs` in electron asar (fixes MODULE_NOT_FOUND after v1.0.33 ETA work)

Reinstall over v1.0.33 (or older) and run **Install Addons** to pick up these changes.
